Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Aquilifer's Mark Ring

The ring owner's attacks have a 55% chance to cast stiffness on the target. The target's attack speed is reduced by 20% for 3 sec.
Every 3 attack the unit makes against the stiff target explodes it, dealing 150000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it. The explosion has a 75% chance to freeze all affected enemies for 2 sec. While frozen, they can't move or attack for 2 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
